channel.title: general on Parag Raut Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in general on Parag Raut Portfolio

item.title: Working in Enterprise
item.description: Working in enterprise has its own benefits and detriments. On one side you get exposed to a huge company wide technical/functional architecture and few too many business processes, and on other side once you get acquainted with it, you are mostly locked to “rigid/legacy/boring/meh/same o' same o'/non-bleeding edge/you name it” technology stack. Specifically for a tinkerer like me it gets booooooring really soon, then the un-ending struggle starts. I get stuck in a vicious circle of learning a new technology to keep up with the ever-changing world of tech and then not being able to apply it anywhere in your work (literally anywhere), and eventually loosing the grip on whatever I have learned.
